name: 5dim_module
title: 5Dim's mod - Modules
author: 5Dim
description:
Modules module for 5Dim's mod
Expands module system with new types and tiers
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of speed modules
- 10 tiers of productivity modules
- 10 tiers of efficiency modules
- 10 tiers of quality modules (requires Quality DLC)
- New pollution modules
- New merged modules (combines all effects)
- 10 tiers of beacons
